title: austrostipa crinita
intro: Austrostipa crinita, also known as curly spear grass or curly grass, is a species of grass native to southeastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported uses including treating skin conditions, wounds, and reducing inflammation. The plant contains various compounds with potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help with wound healing and soothing skin irritations. Austrostipa crinita can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional prior to application.
